passive.name: Iron Will
passive.description: +5% damage reduction while below 30% HP

passive.name: Smoldering Fury
passive.description: +8% STR each round survived (caps at +24%)

passive.name: Bloodthirst
passive.description: Heal 5% max HP on every crit

passive.name: Moonlit Grace
passive.description: +10% dodge chance in Round 1

passive.name: Solar Charge
passive.description: First INT spell of the match deals +30% damage

passive.name: Shadow Strike
passive.description: If you win initiative, your first hit is a guaranteed crit

passive.name: Bite Back
passive.description: Reflect 15% of damage taken back to attacker

passive.name: Slippery
passive.description: 10% chance to fully dodge any incoming attack

passive.name: Ember Burst
passive.description: Crits deal an extra 20% damage

passive.name: Hellfire
passive.description: INT damage ignores 20% of opponent's spell resist

passive.name: Void Drain
passive.description: Heal 8% of all magic damage you deal

passive.name: Cursed Skin
passive.description: The first crit you take each match is reduced to a normal hit

passive.name: Dragonbreath
passive.description: Round 2 attack deals hybrid STR + INT damage

passive.name: Frozen Hide
passive.description: +20% VIT while in Defensive stance

passive.name: Lightning Reflex
passive.description: +15% AGI while at full HP

passive.name: Forged Resolve
passive.description: Flat 10% damage reduction (always on)

passive.name: Anvil Strike
passive.description: Every 2nd attack deals +25% damage

passive.name: Lucky Find
passive.description: +15% LCK in matches with a PYR wager

passive.name: Pack Tactics
passive.description: +10% STR when your PowerScore is lower than opponent's

passive.name: Pounce
passive.description: Always wins initiative (first strike guaranteed)

passive.name: Maul
passive.description: Crits stun the opponent for 1 round (they skip their attack)

passive.name: Soul Link
passive.description: First time you would die, survive at 1 HP (once per match)

passive.name: Phase
passive.description: 15% chance to fully dodge any magic attack

passive.name: Radiant Blessing
passive.description: Heal 10% max HP at the start of Round 2
